title: 1.1: Tests that directory listing and file stat are denied when user lacks list permission
1.2: Tests that file download is denied when user lacks download permission
1.3: Tests that file upload is denied when user lacks upload permission
1.4: Tests that file overwrite is denied when user lacks overwrite permission
1.5: Tests that file deletion is denied when user lacks delete permission
2.1: Places permission denial tests in the sftpd test directory
2.2: Places tests in a Go test file with _test.go suffix
3.1: All tests use Go testing framework with *testing.T parameter
3.2: All tests follow naming pattern starting with Test prefix
3.3: All tests use t.Errorf or t.Error for reporting test failures
3.4: All tests remove created users and clean up home directories after execution
4.1: Permission tests create users via API with specific permission configurations before testing
4.2: Permission tests establish SFTP client connections to perform operations
